content: get the employees who earn less than 80000

The SQL query returned a list of three employees who earn less than $80,000. Specifically, Bob from Marketing with a salary of $70,000, Dave from HR with a salary of $60,000, and Eve also from Marketing with a salary of $75,000. It is evident that there are employees who earn below the specified threshold of $80,000 in this particular dataset.

The PEO Industry refers to Professional Employer Organizations, which began to evolve in the early 1980s as a response to the increasing legal and regulatory burdens on small and medium-sized employers. These organizations emerged to provide assistance with various tasks.
